nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.general_idea: Refactor flat basic auth properties into a nested static class for better structure.
nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.human_impl: Replaced `basicAuthUsername`, `basicAuthPassword`, and `ignorePath` fields with a `BasicAuthConfig` inner class instance.

nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.general_idea: Derive the enable flag from the presence of the config object instead of storing it explicitly.
nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.human_impl: Removed `enableBasicAuth` field and added `isEnableBasicAuth()` method checking `Objects.nonNull(basicAuth)`.

nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.general_idea: Add Jackson annotations to control serialization behavior for the properties class.
nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.human_impl: Added `@JsonIgnoreProperties(ignoreUnknown = true)` and `@JsonInclude(JsonInclude.Include.NON_NULL)` to the class.

nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.general_idea: Remove Spring-specific annotations likely moved to a separate configuration class.
Add a private constructor throwing UnsupportedOperationException to prevent instantiation of the utility class.
Replace the deprecated @date Javadoc tag with the standard @since tag.
Refactor try-with-resources to use the Java 9+ syntax where resources are declared outside the try block.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Introduce a boolean flag to allow disabling HTTP 304 Not Modified responses for specific use cases.
Provide a fluent API method to disable the 304 status return behavior.
nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.human_impl: public MultipartFileSender no304CodeReturn() { enable304StatusReturn = false; return this; }

nas-common/src/main/java/top/itning/yuns.general_idea: Wrap If-None-Match and If-Modified-Since validation logic in a check for the new enable304StatusReturn flag.
Replace hardcoded HTTP header string literals with constants from org.springframework.http.HttpHeaders for type safety and consistency.
Replace hardcoded 'application/octet-stream' string with MediaType.APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM_VALUE constant.
Only set ETag, Last-Modified, and Expires response headers when 304 status return is enabled.
Change Javadoc @date tag to @since for better standard compliance.
Replace the traditional class with a Java record to leverage concise syntax for immutable data carriers.
